/usr/bin/bash -c source /tmp/hermes-snap-f084424ca2c3.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
builtin cd -- /srv/agents/repos/callscore-workplane || exit 126
eval 'python3 - <<'\''PY'\''
import os, subprocess, json, shlex
roots=['\''/srv'\'','\''/opt'\'','\''/home'\'','\''/var'\'','\''/usr'\'','\''/tmp'\'']
for root in roots:
    if not os.path.exists(root):
        continue
    print(f'\''### DU {root}'\'')
    p=subprocess.run(['\''du'\'','\''-x'\'','\''-B1'\'','\''--max-depth=2'\'',root],stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,text=True,timeout=240)
    rows=[]
    for line in p.stdout.splitlines():
        try:
            size,path=line.split('\''\t'\'',1)
            rows.append((int(size),path))
        except ValueError:
            pass
    for size,path in sorted(rows, reverse=True)[:25]:
        print(f'\''{size}\t{path}'\'')
    if p.stderr.strip():
        print('\''stderr_first_lines:'\'', '\''\n'\''.join(p.stderr.splitlines()[:5]))
PY'
__hermes_ec=$?
export -p > /tmp/hermes-sna
